ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_type" TEXT /* Type of geometric shape (e.g., curve, surface, solid) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shape */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shape was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the shape */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the shape */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shape is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the point belongs to */,
  "point_index" INTEGER /* Index of the point in the shape */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the point */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the point (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the point was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_points_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the calculation was performed on */,
  "calculation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calculation type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the calculation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the calculation was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_calculations_calculation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("calculation_type_id") REFERENCES calculation_types ("calculation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_calculations_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculation_types" (
  "calculation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation type */,
  "calculation_type" TEXT /* Name of the calculation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calculation type */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula used for the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shape_versions_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the collaboration is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collaboration started */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON or text data containing the report details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the visualization is for */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Image data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the visualization was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
